summary_sections.title: Lesson Overview
summary_sections.content_html:
Overview

This lesson covers the fundamental measures of center used to analyze and summarize data sets. You'll learn how to calculate and apply the mean, median, and mode, and understand when each is most appropriate.

summary_sections.title: Definitions and Concepts
summary_sections.content_html:
Key Definitions

What is the image of (3, ‚ąí4) after a 90¬į counterclockwise rotation about the origin?

Substitute the input value into the function expression and simplify using order of operations. The result is (4, 3). The other options ‚ÄĒ '(‚ąí3, 4)', '(‚ąí4, ‚ąí3)', and '(3, 4)' ‚ÄĒ are related concepts but do not correctly answer this specific question.

What is the coordinate rule for a 180¬į rotation about the origin?

A rotation turns a figure around a fixed point by a given angle. 90¬į rotations: (x,y) ‚Üí (-y,x). 180¬į: (x,y) ‚Üí (-x,-y). The answer is (x, y) ‚Üí (‚ąíx, ‚ąíy). The other options ‚ÄĒ '(x, y) ‚Üí (‚ąíy, x)', '(x, y) ‚Üí (y, ‚ąíx)', and '(x, y) ‚Üí (x, ‚ąíy)' ‚ÄĒ are related concepts but do not correctly answer this specific question.

What is the image of (‚ąí1, 6) after a 270¬į counterclockwise rotation about the origin?

Substitute the input value into the function expression and simplify using order of operations. The result is (6, 1). The other options ‚ÄĒ '(‚ąí6, ‚ąí1)', '(1, ‚ąí6)', and '(‚ąí6, 1)' ‚ÄĒ are related concepts but do not correctly answer this specific question.

summary_sections.title: Real-World Applications
summary_sections.content_html:
Real-World Applications

Example: What is the image of (‚ąí1, 6) after a 270¬į counterclockwise rotation about the origin?
